title: [PrettifyVerilog] Dead wires can change how the `not` operation is printed

features.name: not operation influenced by dead wire constant
features.description: Code should include a not operation on a signal alongside an unused wire assigned a constant value that causes incorrect emission as xor instead of inversion

features.name: unused wire with constant assignment affecting operator emission
features.description: Code should include an unused wire with a constant assignment that incorrectly influences how adjacent operations are emitted in verilog output
